title: Version audit
description: Check current PyPI/crates versions and repo release state.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Audit: PyPI reports kanbus latest 0.6.0 (pip index). Crates.io versions head: 0.8.2, 0.8.1, 0.7.0. Latest git tag now fetched: v0.9.0. Python version sources mismatch: pyproject.toml=0.9.0, src/kanbus/__init__.py=0.6.0. Release workflow: semantic-release in python/, then sync Cargo.toml to tag and publish crate.
